svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/144.0.0.0 YaBrowser/26.3.0.0 Safari/537.36"> <diagram name="Страница-1" id="R_Abwmb0qKa7FQC6TC4V"> <mxGraphModel dx="1228" dy="720" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title Диаграмма классов

skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Flower {
 - id: int
 - name: String
 - sort: String
 - price: decimal
}

class Composition {
 - id: int
 - name: String
}

class CompositionItem {
 - id: int
 - quantity: int
}

class Order {
 - id: int
 - orderDate: Date
 - deliveryDate: Date
 - customer: String
 - quantity: int
 - urgencyType: int
 - totalPrice: decimal
}

class OrderCost {
 - id: int
 - basePrice: decimal
 - urgencyMarkup: decimal
 - finalPrice: decimal
}

class DatabaseManager {
 + connect()
 + disconnect()
 + executeQuery()
 + executeUpdate()
}

class OrderRepository {
 + insert()
 + update()
 + delete()
 + findById()
 + findByDate()
}

class ReportService {
 + getRevenueByPeriod()
 + getMostPopularComposition()
 + getOrdersByUrgency()
 + getFlowerUsageByPeriod()
 + getSalesByCompositionType()
}

class PriceController {
 + validatePriceIncrease()
 + checkCompositionCostIncrease()
}

class OrderService {
 + createOrderWithCost()
 + getOrdersByDate()
}

' ==================== СТРЕЛКИ ====================

Flower --> CompositionItem
Composition --> CompositionItem
Composition --> Order
Order --> OrderCost

OrderService --> OrderRepository
OrderService --> PriceController
OrderRepository --> DatabaseManager
ReportService --> DatabaseManager
PriceController --> Flower

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="WEgXaa19wBj_qq0J4YZe-7"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="859" width="659" x="20" y="1000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
